articles.title: Turkey - USA live: hosts chase top spot as Group D reaches finale
articles.description: The United States face Turkey on Friday in the final Group D matchday, kicking off at 4am CEST from Los Angeles. The USMNT, already qualified, pursue an unbeaten record and top-spot confirmation. Simultaneously in San Francisco, Australia and Paraguay, both on three points, battle for the group's second qualifying berth; a loss might mean elimination. Follow our liveblog to see how it unfolds.
